subcodes.first_line: O ye divine friends! Though it is eventide and the fast of Ramadan hath brought weariness and lassitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران الهی بعد از عصر است و روزه رمضان کسالت و رخاوت و سستی آورده با وجود
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrdom of the Bab
